Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Continued To Dec-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Carole Scagnetti appearing via zoom for Shane Kelly (petitioner).

The Court advised counsel to file a new petition for final distribution with a omnibus clause that would allow parties to distribute the additional estate tax refund to the trust, together with the remaining proceeds from the sale proceeds from Thailand. Petition for approval of report of status of administration is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Continued To Mar-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vanessa Sundin, via ZOOM, for Shane Kelley, Administrator.

Ms. Sundin reports that she believes that the issues with the IRS have been resolved and believes that the estate is owed a refund from the IRS. Ms. Sundin requests that the court grant an extension of administration for one year. The court and counsel then discuss why her client cannot file a petition for final distribution and request an order to include an omnibus clause to allow Mr. Kelley to distribute the IRS refund to the trust once it's received. Ms. Sundin provides oral advocacy in support of her request to extend administration for an additional year. The court then confirms with Ms. Sundin that the IRS has not received notice regarding this matter. Ms. Sundin reports that the IRS is aware of the matter as her client has been working with them for some time and they have not filed a claim or a request for special notice but that she can provide notice to the IRS if the court instructs her to do so. The court instructs Ms. Sundin to provide notice to the IRS.

The Accounting Status Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: S. Saephan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jerry Hauser for and with Jack Teeter (Former Executor - appeared by telephone).
Yulissa Zulaica for Shane White (Current Executor) and Shane White and Jack Teeter (Co-Trustees).

Mr. Hauser stated that he has nothing to add and that all funds have been accounted for. Ms. Zulaica stated that she has no objection to the petition and that all of the Beneficiaries got notice which included expenditures of the probate and the Trust. The Amended Petition for Approval of First and Final Report and Account of Former Executor is taken under submission for the Court to determine whether to allow or approve the accounting.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Executor Jack Eugene Teeters Resignation And Nomination Of Successor Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: YULISSA ZULAICA AND JEAN JOHNSTON FOR PETITIONER SHANE WHITE; PATRICK KELLY.

Ms. Zulaica had nothing to add regarding the two pending petitions. The Court inquired regarding the appropriate amount of bond. Ms Zulaica stated that the assets of the estate did not exceed $150,000, but she would obtain a bond in the sum of $200,000.00. Mr. Kelly statted that he was present as a creditor of the estate, and that the amount of his claim was well in excess of $200,000.00. The Court stated that the amount of the bond was to be based upon the value of the estate assets, not potential claims against the estate. Mr. Kelly stated that the estate received a larger sum in settlement of an action against prior counsel. Ms. Johnston agreed that the estate had received a larger sum, but stated that a large amount of the settlement had been used to pay tax obligations, and the funds had also been expended in defending the litigation brought by Mr. Kelly, such that the remaining balance was under $200,000.00. The Court granted the petition for approval of resignation of executor Jack Eugene Teeters (subject to receipt and review of the order), with bond set in the sum of $200,000.00. The Court then granted the Petition for letters of administration (subject to review of order). The Court set a status hearing re filing of the first and final account by former executor Jack Teeters for August 1, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)

Petition For Account Of Estate Of Thomas F. White And Thomas F. White 1991 Trust
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Kelly in Propria Persona. Yulissa Zulaica for and with (beneficiaries/trustees) Shane White & Jack Teeters (via court call). Jack Teeters (via court call) (executor) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that we have a report on status and a petition to account, that it is depending on the outcome of the civil case, that it is clear from the report that the case will not close before that and that it is inclined to approve the status report and set a date for a further status report. Ms. Zulaica reported that they have filed a petition for approval of Mr. Teeters resignation, that it will come with an accounting, that they have one case set for trial and that there is a new lawsuit and that it makes more sense for Mr. White to handle the matters as he is in San Francisco. The Court stated that there is a demurrer set in the civil case but that it will not end the litigation. Mr. Kelly expressed concern regarding the prayer being part of the order stating that what they say in the report has no back up. The Court granted the accounting status report (subject to receipt/review of the order). A further status on administration or petition for final distribution is set for October 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition for account of Estate of Thomas F. White and Thomas F. White 1991 trust is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Account Of Estate Of Thomas F. White And Thomas F. White 1991 Trust
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Kelly in Propria Persona. Yulissa Zulaica specially appearing for the Thomas White Trust. Jack Teeters (via court call) in Propria Persona. Shane White also present.

The Court stated that we are here on Mr. Kelly's amended petition, that with respect to ordering an accounting we now have a status report set for 4/13/16, that the estate cannot close with pending civil litigation and asked if there was any reason not to continue this hearing to be heard on 4/13/16. Mr. Kelly stated that he is concerned and that a provision should be made for creditors, that a shell game is being played between the estate and the trust and that he wants to protect his claim. The Court stated that his claim depends on what happens in the civil litigation, that the estate is not closing and that the status proposes how they want to proceed. Mr. Kelly stated that he wants an acknowledgment that the court needs to look after what is going on here and that they are not following probate rules. The Court stated that that may or may not be correct and that they have submitted a plan. Ms. Zulaica stated that it makes sense to continue. The petition for account of Estate of Thomas F. White and Thomas F. White 1991 Trust was continued to April 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
